    M

    Mage - Class in pieces
    Represents a Mage piece on the game board.
    Mage(Color, Position) - Constructor for class pieces.Mage
    Initializes a new Mage piece.
    MageTest - Class in pieces
    Test suite for the Mage piece.
    MageTest() - Constructor for class pieces.MageTest
     
    main - package main
     
    main(String[]) - Static method in class main.Main
    The main method that starts the Java application.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class ui.ChessApp
    Static launcher method for the JavaFX framework.
    Main - Class in main
    The main entry point for the application.
    Main() - Constructor for class main.Main
     
    makeMove(Position, Position) - Method in class core.GameEngine
    Attempts to perform a standard move for a piece from one position to another.
    Moveable - Interface in core
    Represents an entity that can move across the game board.
    movePiece(Piece, Position) - Method in class core.Board
    Moves a piece to a new destination.
    MoveResult - Class in core
    Encapsulates the outcome of an attempted move or action within the game.
    MoveResult(MoveResult.Status, Piece, boolean) - Constructor for class core.MoveResult
    Constructs a new MoveResult with the specified details.
    MoveResult.Status - Enum Class in core
    Represents the specific status or reason for a move's outcome.
